title: HOPE & WELLNESS SERVICES - 211info
text: LIBERTY HOUSE HOPE & WELLNESS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling to youth and their families who have received an assessment for abuse or neglect at Liberty House or another child abuse assessment center; or who have experienced trauma or grief. Services are trauma-focused with an emphasis on collaboration with the client and family to develop and work toward goals. 2685 4th Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 facing concerns of child abuse, neglect, trauma, or grief, and their families or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 689-1006 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 689-1006 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Most insurance plans accepted. Fees range from $79 per hour for group therapy to $258 for initial assessment. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located just off the Salem Parkway in north Salem Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Abuse Counseling Child Sexual Abuse Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER PUBLIC SAFETY - IRESPECT&PROTECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIBERTY HOUSE
